Localization.Description: One of the types of delegation is configured in the domain: unlimited delegation, limited delegation, limited resource-based delegation. An attacker can use this setting to obtain users TGT or TGS tickets. After that, an attacker can elevate privileges and horizontally move to other infrastructure nodes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} configured resource-based constrained delegation (RBCD) for host {src.hostname} to host {object.value}
User {subject.account.name} configured constrained delegation from the host {src.hostname} to the host {object.value}
User {subject.account.name} configured unconstrained delegation in the domain from the host {src.hostname}
